title: Qualatex 26798 Thank You Colourful Confetti 18" Round Shaped Foil Balloon
features: High quality Microfoil / foil / mylar balloon. Supplied uninflated.
Perfect for party decorations or to give as a gift
Includes self sealing valve to prevent gas escaping after inflation.
Inflate with helium or air. This balloon can be inflated with helium (to float) or with air (does not float). Helium inflator or balloon pump/air inflator required.
Always weight helium-filled balloons and do not release into the air.
description: From the manufacturer Qualatex Balloons Recognised as The Very Best, and trusted by balloon professionals across the world, Qualatex latex balloons are made from natural rubber latex. Qualatex balloons are made in the USA and Canada in plants that have met ISO9001/2015 standards. Speciality & Entertainer Balloon entertainers worldwide choose Qualatex balloons. We offer all of the sizes, shapes, and colours you want along with the durability you need to withstand the twists and turns of entertaining. Licensed Invite an entire cast of characters to your next party with licensed balloons! Printed From baby showers to birthday parties, Qualatex has a print to match the occasion. Designed to coordinate with Qualatex Microfoil and Bubble Balloons, Qualatex latex is the decorator's choice for event decor that creates lasting memories. Assortments So many beautiful colours it's hard to pick just one - so pick up one of the brilliant Qualatex assortments instead! Choose from popular colour mixes like Bright Rainbow, Tropical, Pastel, Metallic mix and more!
